subcodes.first_line: Know thou, O wayfarer unto God, that all things bear witness that thou hast attained unto the presence of God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم یا ایها السالک الی الله یشهد الاشیاء کلها بانک فزت بلقاء الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
